nuanced_query: Swapping old calculation engine for smarter heuristic in new architecture
lexical_query: Keep deterministic machinery when simplifying and redesigning systems
why_maps: Replacing proven rule-based logic with adaptive substitutes risks losing reliability during migration

nuanced_query: Revising a behavioral guide and requiring evidence that the pre-revision version exhibited the wrong behavior before making the change
lexical_query: Skill edits require baseline tests before validating changes
why_maps: Changed instructions need measured evidence the old behavior was inadequate before trusting improvement

nuanced_query: Altering a sequencing skill that delegates across multiple steps, needing a written design committed first and fresh behavioral evidence after
lexical_query: Workflow changes require committed plan doc and fresh agent tests
why_maps: Orchestration changes affect downstream behavior; documenting first plus fresh tests catch issues early

nuanced_query: Comparing test tools that auto-generate varied inputs for code
lexical_query: Property-based testing frameworks validate properties across random inputs
why_maps: Tools that generate random test cases detect properties holding regardless of input shape

nuanced_query: Testing whether input changes produce predictable output shifts
lexical_query: Metamorphic relations classify how input transforms affect outputs
why_maps: When exact correctness is unverifiable, test that input modifications cause expected output behavior

nuanced_query: Designing context delivery from archive, separating fresh data tier from historical patterns
lexical_query: Design recall payload as explicit working-memory analog
why_maps: Recent activity needs different visibility/precedence than indexed archive to mimic memory tiers

nuanced_query: Ordering data transformations before structural wrapping to preserve sorted properties
lexical_query: apply recency band to scoredChunk before resolvedItem conversion
why_maps: Operations that change data order must precede type transformations that lose that ordering

nuanced_query: Type checker warns about an unreferenced field before dependent code lands
lexical_query: unused struct fields require consumer not nolint suppression
why_maps: Satisfying lint warnings early with real consumers beats deferred suppression

nuanced_query: Testing dual-output API without completely specifying both return paths
lexical_query: RunQuery chunk integration test needs nil notes in QueryDeps Scan
why_maps: Incomplete mocking of paired outputs produces false-positive integration tests

nuanced_query: Formatting a qualified identifier appears in three separate functions
lexical_query: string concatenation across multiple files needs named helper
why_maps: Duplicated formatting logic across callsites obscures intent and invites inconsistency

nuanced_query: A fresh signal clearly wins over uniformly stale noise in tests
lexical_query: recency eval with recent chunk beats homogeneous old distractors
why_maps: Skewed test distribution masks whether the mechanism itself calibrates the dimension

nuanced_query: Testing a ranking parameter evaluation when all noise items have identical age
lexical_query: half-life sweep with uniform age distractors gives no discrimination
why_maps: Uniform noise prevents learning the parameter's calibration and sensitivity

nuanced_query: Adding a non-breaking field to a serialized versioned format won't break older readers
lexical_query: Sidecar omitempty fields don't require schema version bump
why_maps: Non-participating fields don't change the structural contract that version readers enforce

nuanced_query: Static analysis marks a struct member unused because its consuming logic is deferred to a later implementation step
lexical_query: Add test accessor in export_test for unexported fields used later
why_maps: Test accessor marks field as used, satisfying linter while keeping field unexported

nuanced_query: Implementing a new subcommand handler requiring injected I/O dependencies
lexical_query: RunActivate and ActivateDeps must follow the newOsXxxDeps pattern
why_maps: Consistent naming across command handlers makes the dependency-injection pattern discoverable

nuanced_query: Cache invalidation check shouldn't trigger when access timestamp in the metadata updates
lexical_query: LastUsed must be omitempty and excluded from ContentHash
why_maps: Staleness detection ignores metadata; only actual content changes should invalidate cache

nuanced_query: Tool accepting file paths as arguments needs verification running the actual compiled binary
lexical_query: Verify CLI with real installed binary and real arguments from non-data-dir cwd
why_maps: In-memory tests hide CWD and path-resolution bugs only visible in real invocation

nuanced_query: Adding a list field to output matching how other result attributes serialize
lexical_query: candidate_l2s follows the activated flag serialization pattern in query
why_maps: Consistent serialization patterns across output fields ensure uniform client parsing

nuanced_query: Writing a loop that processes collection elements from end to start in engram Go code
lexical_query: Backward iteration over a slice in Go; use slices.Backward idiom instead
why_maps: The lesson teaches that the standard library's iteration helper is the right idiom for descending traversal, avoiding manual indexing errors.

nuanced_query: User wants to discard obsolete config and dead-code markers to declutter repository
lexical_query: Cleanup asks: lean aggressive, git is safety net, consolidate into single doc
why_maps: The lesson teaches that Joe is comfortable with aggressive deletions because version control provides recovery and consolidation helps maintainability.

nuanced_query: Team designs wrongly because handbook still describes an outdated architectural flow nobody updated
lexical_query: After major refactor, stale docs describing removed paths cause later design misses
why_maps: The lesson teaches that unupdated documentation silently becomes the source of truth, leading to flawed design assumptions downstream.

nuanced_query: Handbook and diagrams still show the deleted feature, though code is gone
lexical_query: Removal isn't done until docs, memory, and diagrams naming the deleted path are updated
why_maps: The lesson teaches that completion requires all trace removal—not just code deletion, but documentation and all references scrubbed.

nuanced_query: A shared CLI surface is modified and verification scripts that relied on the prior interface signature stop working silently
lexical_query: After removing a cross-cutting API, verify test and eval harnesses still work
why_maps: The lesson teaches that internal testing infrastructure is a first-class consumer whose contracts must be verified after refactoring.

nuanced_query: A RAG pipeline collates matching chunks and the consolidated result is treated as if it produced a novel deduction
lexical_query: Distinguish aggregation and abstraction from emergent synthesis; combining similar facts isn't new insight
why_maps: The lesson teaches the critical distinction: mechanical grouping of similar items is aggregation, not genuine novelty or synthesis.

nuanced_query: Expected system broken, but measured behavior shows it already works fine
lexical_query: RED baseline contradicts design assumption — surface measured reality to user
why_maps: When measurements contradict what the design said should happen, that's a signal to re-evaluate, not engineer the test.

nuanced_query: Adding ranking filters before confirming multi-term queries already work
lexical_query: Multiphrase recall subsumes graph expansion — validate retrieval layers first
why_maps: Many retrieval enhancements are premature optimization; basic multi-phrase search often already solves it.

nuanced_query: Model outputs a conclusion during work, but that doesn't mean it's searchable later
lexical_query: In-session synthesis differs from persisting for future retrieval
why_maps: The agent producing it once is ephemeral; making it persistent and findable is a different capability.

nuanced_query: Agent inferred a finding mid-session from stored facts; wondering whether an uncertain output should be written back to the vault at all
lexical_query: Persist synthesis notes as derived and hedged, not for accuracy
why_maps: Persisted conclusions are aids for inspection and context, not ground truth; marking source/confidence makes them safe.

nuanced_query: Using cheaper labor for part of a task, unclear where quality work ends
lexical_query: Split skill at judgment seam, not bespoke infrastructure
why_maps: The wrong split point creates dependencies and redoes work; the right seam is where judgment ends.

nuanced_query: Using two services in sequence to reduce total cost, but delegated work is small
lexical_query: Do not split a skill across models unless large share
why_maps: Most of a skill's cost is usually in one place; splitting adds coordination overhead.

nuanced_query: Diagnosing why a past failure keeps getting suggested, worried the ranking system is wrong
lexical_query: recall miss is structural not retrieval scoring
why_maps: Re-proposing a known failure is a design/trigger gap, not a search-ranking problem

nuanced_query: Conflating efficiency improvement in one stage with total investment across the whole pipeline
lexical_query: separate marginal cost premium from absolute total investment
why_maps: Multi-phase cost requires separating per-stage margin from total budget when weighing tradeoffs

nuanced_query: Evaluating system behavior at scale without constructing the actual large dataset
lexical_query: stub binary replaces fixture for realistic scale testing
why_maps: Scale evals need measured behavior, not real artifacts; mocks reproduce patterns without building

nuanced_query: Primary objective neglected in favor of nearby cleanup; strict review cycle might explain
lexical_query: task displacement amplified by aggressive challenge feedback
why_maps: Aggressive critical feedback can trigger task-displacement by making agents second-guess the ask

nuanced_query: Five intermediate milestones completed, each defensible, but unsure if the starting objective still matches
lexical_query: re-anchor on goal and revalidate carried-forward work
why_maps: Intermediate progress can drift from original intent; periodic re-anchoring revalidates carried work

nuanced_query: Concluding an approach is impossible because it's slow, expensive, and fails unpredictably
lexical_query: decompose obstacles into structural versus contingent before asserting
why_maps: Before rejecting as impossible, decompose obstacles to separate hard limits from tuning levers
